description:
Advances: specled.realized_by

Deliverable:
Add SpecLedEx.Validator.RealizedByDedupe (single source of truth for duplicate detection) at lib/specled_ex/validator/realized_by_dedupe.ex with duplicates(subject) returning [{tier_pair, entry}]. Trim entries before intersection. Add SpecLedEx.Validator.RealizedByDedupCheck.findings(index, severity \\ 'warning') at lib/specled_ex/validator/realized_by_dedup_check.ex emitting realized_by_redundant_dup with per-form message text (MFA-form vs bare-module-form). Wire into Mix.Tasks.Spec.Validate via with_validator_findings (or rename with_prose_findings to with_validator_findings).

Verification:
- Tests to pass: new test/specled_ex/validator/realized_by_dedup_check_test.exs covers the shared seam + finding shape + per-form message variants. Integration via mix spec.validate end-to-end with a crafted fixture spec containing a duplication.
- Behaviors to demonstrate: spec requirements specled.realized_by.redundant_dup_warning, dedup_check_shared_seam.

Out of Scope (files):
- lib/mix/tasks/spec.dedup_realized_by.ex (S8)
- lib/specled_ex/realization/** (already shipped in S1-S5)
- .spec/**
Allowed touches:
- lib/specled_ex/validator/realized_by_dedupe.ex (new)
- lib/specled_ex/validator/realized_by_dedup_check.ex (new)
- lib/mix/tasks/spec.validate.ex (only to wire the new check)
- test/specled_ex/validator/realized_by_dedup_check_test.exs (new)
- test/specled_ex/mix/tasks/spec_validate_test.exs (only to add the integration test for the new code)

Out of Scope (intent):
- Severity hardcoded :warning; do NOT add config plumbing for the new code.
- Do NOT alter the existing prose check or other validator findings.
- Do NOT emit a finding from the future dedup task; findings flow through mix spec.validate only.

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly
- [ ] Tests listed above pass
- [ ] Spec verification passes
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs (mechanical)
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket

IMPLEMENTED
Session: eeca2123-30e1-430c-90c1-08dd23adf991
Log: ~/.claude-personal/projects/-Users-mz-src-specled-ex/eeca2123-30e1-430c-90c1-08dd23adf991.jsonl

Commit: 418be73
Stage branch: specled_-701.8/validator-dedup-check
Stage worktree: /Users/mz/src/specled_ex-701.8 (rebased on epic HEAD b743e26)

Files touched:
- lib/specled_ex/validator/realized_by_dedupe.ex (new)
- lib/specled_ex/validator/realized_by_dedup_check.ex (new)
- lib/mix/tasks/spec.validate.ex (renamed with_prose_findings -> with_validator_findings; added RealizedByDedupCheck call)
- test/specled_ex/validator/realized_by_dedup_check_test.exs (new)
- test/specled_ex/mix/tasks/spec_validate_test.exs (new)

Tests added:
- SpecLedEx.Validator.RealizedByDedupCheckTest (19 tests covering shared seam: trim/sort/uniq/atom-keys/orthogonal-tiers/malformed; finding shape: severity/code/subject_id/message/multi-subject; per-form messages: MFA strict-subset vs bare-module head-union/full-union; remediation pointer)
- Mix.Tasks.Spec.Validate.RealizedByDedupTest (3 tests: end-to-end mix spec.validate with MFA dup, bare-module dup, no-dup negative)

Verification stubs flipped: none. The realized_by.spec.md verification block for redundant_dup_warning + dedup_check_shared_seam stays at execute: false because `.spec/**` is Out of Scope for this ticket; the flip is owned by S9 (701.10) which performs the author-side dedup demonstrating the scenario end-to-end.

Local sanity:
- mix compile --warnings-as-errors clean
- new tests: 22/22 pass
- full suite: 715 tests + 2 properties, 0 failures

Note: running mix spec.validate on the project itself now surfaces a real realized_by_redundant_dup warning on .spec/specs/realized_by.spec.md (which lists EffectiveBinding.expand_implications/1 under both tiers). This is the intended catch — S9 is the ticket that author-side-dedupes the existing specs.

Summary: Adds the shared duplicate-detection seam (RealizedByDedupe.duplicates/1, single source of truth for the validator and the future mix spec.dedup_realized_by task) plus the validator finding emitter (RealizedByDedupCheck.findings/2) and wires them into mix spec.validate alongside the existing prose-rot check. Severity is hardcoded :warning per Decision 7 of specled.decision.realized_by_tier_implication; per-form message text differs between MFA-form (strict-subset framing) and bare-module-form (head-union vs full-union framing) duplicates per the spec requirement.

title: S7: Validator dedup check (RealizedByDedupe + RealizedByDedupCheck)
